description: Fix brand system issues from semantic review: color collision, dark-mode token drift, add tests, per-app favicon colors
steps: Fix quantads color collision in packages/brand/src/apps.ts - change from #10B981 to #059669 (emerald-600)
Fix dark-mode token drift in packages/shared-ui/src/themes/tokens.ts - use brand primary[400] and accent[400]
Update all 7 layout.tsx favicon fills to use per-app colors
acceptance_criteria: quantads has a distinct color from quantchat
darkTokens uses brand primary[400] (#818CF8) and accent[400] (#FBBF24)
Each app has a distinct favicon color matching its brand color
findings: All 4 review issues resolved. Typecheck 111/111, build 88/88, tests 12/12. Prettier auto-formatted via lint-staged on commit.
